title: mldsa::sign always allocates MLDSA_MAX_SIG_LEN=4627 bytes regardless of level
description: mldsa.rs::sign always vec![0u8; 4627] (level-87 maximum). For level 44 (2420 bytes) and level 65 (3309 bytes) this wastes 2207 and 1318 bytes respectively per call. Since self.level is known at call time, the allocation can be sized exactly: 2420 for level 44, 3309 for level 65, 4627 for level 87. Minor but allocating 2x the needed size on every sign call is unnecessary.
